creator: anarcat+register@orangeseeds.org
text:
There's an error in the above patch:

#    342 -rw-r--r-- files/patch-src_share_keytrans
#    443 -rw-r--r-- files/patch-src_monkeysphere-host

Those files should be removed from the port.

Also note that the previous version doesn't uninstall properly: you will
need to run "rm /usr/local/man/man1/openpgp2s*" manually before
installing this port otherwise it will fail to install after build.

A.

-- 
It is the greatest of all mistakes to do nothing because you can only
do little. Do what you can.
                         - Sydney Smith
